_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: WT mice had gained an average of 50% increase in body weight as compared to an average of 30% increase in body weight for the Nf1 +/− cohort
details: 30% increase in body weight vs. 50% increase in WT mice on high-glucose diet for 16 weeks
